summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Fix 1 (MLB feedback loop + Basketball intelligence warehouse) and Fix 2 (Statcast warehouse-first lookup). All 733 pytest tests passed (701 previous + 32 new). Zero regressions. All API endpoints functional. Sport isolation verified. Fail-soft behavior confirmed. Sample-size gates working correctly.
